positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, mandala-style celestial flora wreath. The design features interwoven elements of stylized crescent moons, vibrant deep indigo nebulae, delicate bioluminescent star clusters, and abstract golden laurel leaves. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, ideal for repeating textile prints. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep midnight blue, sapphire blue, brilliant gold leaf texture, and teal accents. The style should be Neo-Art Deco combined with psychedelic etching, achieving a sophisticated, luxurious, and graphic quality. Studio shot, crisp vector lines, clean silhouettes, flat background isolation on white or transparent background for printing.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, writing, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, oversaturated, bokeh
